subcodes.first_line: O Ḥusayn! The Most Exalted Pen beareth witness to thy devotion, thy humility, thy submissiveness and thy resignation in the days of the True One, glorified be He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حسین قلم اعلی شهادت میدهد بر اقبال و خضوع و خشوع و تسلیم تو در ایام حق جل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
